label: Number of unstable eigenvalues equals number of interior nodes of the marginal mode

provenance.source_span: ANNALS OF PHYSICS: 10, 232-267 (1960) Hydromagnetic Stability of a Diffuse Linear Pinch* WILLIAM A. NEWCOMB Lawrence Radiation Laboratory, University of California,

strengths: Provides a precise node-counting diagnostic rather than only a qualitative instability statement.
weaknesses: The diagnostic is not automatically valid for the non-self-adjoint flow operator without additional machinery.
